name: 45-Degree Bicycle Twisting Crunch
shortDescription: A twisting ab exercise performed at a 45-degree angle to target the abdominals and obliques.
instructions: Lie flat on your back with knees bent and hands behind your head. Lift your shoulders and legs off the ground to a 45-degree angle and alternate bringing each knee in toward your chest while twisting the opposite elbow towards it, simulating a bicycle pedaling motion. Maintain controlled, twisting movement for each rep.
steps: Lie on your back with hands behind your head and knees bent.
Lift your shoulders and feet off the ground, creating a 45-degree angle with your torso and legs.
Bring your right knee in while twisting your left elbow towards it.
Switch sides, extending the right leg and bringing the left knee in as your right elbow moves towards it.
Continue alternating sides in a smooth, controlled motion.
formCues: Keep lower back pressed to ground
Move legs in a controlled fashion
breathing: Exhale as you crunch and twist, inhale as you return to center.
